raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting a complaint regarding a disputed credit card transaction on my American Express account in the amount of {$1500.00} from approximately XX/XX/year>. 
I reported this transaction as unauthorized ; however, my claim was denied after their investigation. I was informed that a one-time passcode was used to approve a {$550.00} purchase, but I do not recall receiving or entering any such code for this transaction. 
This transaction does not align with my normal usage or purchasing behavior. 
I do not recognize this charge and did not knowingly authorize it. There were no unusual circumstances or account issues that I am aware of that would explain how this transaction occurred. I also did not receive any goods or services related to this charge. 
I am concerned that the determination may have been based primarily on the use of a one-time passcode, without considering the possibility that it may have been used without my knowledge.
